name: Blue Ribbon Jerky
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Beef; brisket, eye-of-round or flank steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim meat completely of all fat.
2. Place meat in freezer until slightly frozen.
3. Cut across grain into slices 1/8 inch thick.
4. In a small bowl, blend all ingredients except meat.
5. Dip each piece of meat into marinade, coating well.
6. Place marinated pieces in a shallow dish and pour remaining marinade over top.
7. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
Oven method:
8. Preheat oven to lowest setting (preferably 110°F).
9. Place several layers of paper towels on baking sheets.
10. Arrange meat in a single layer on prepared sheets and cover with additional toweling.
11. Flatten meat with a rolling pin.
12. Discard towels and set meat directly on oven racks.
13. Let dry for 8 to 12 hours (depending on temperature of oven).
Dehydrator method:
14. Arrange meat on trays in a single layer and dehydrate for 10 to 12 hours, depending on thickness.
Store jerky in plastic bags or tightly covered containers in a cool, dry area.
